description:
Account ledger filled with Arabic script and Judaeo-Arabic entries. Several pages. Merits examination.

Includes on one page an Arabic poem transcribed into Hebrew characters (the same poem appears in T-S Ar.51.77v):

He who doesn't wear the garb of piety is naked even when he's clothed.
A man's best clothing/trait is obedience to God, and there is no good in he who disobeys Him. 

إذا المرءُ لم يلبسْ ثيابًا مِن الـتُّقَى 		تقلَّبَ عريانًا وإن كان كاسيَا
وخيرُ لباسِ/خصالِ المرءِ طاعةُ ربِّه		ولا خيرَ فيمَن كان للهِ عاصيَا
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
